name: Merge Overlapping Subintervals
category: Solve Problems on Arrays [Easy -> Medium -> Hard]
statement:
Given an array of intervals where intervals[i] = [starti, endi], merge all overlapping intervals and return an array of the non-overlapping intervals that cover all the intervals in the input.


You can return the intervals in any order.

examples.explanation: Intervals [1,5] and [3,6] overlap, so they are merged into [1,6].
Intervals [4,6] and [5,7] overlap and are merged into [4,7].
